title: Medieval Origins Revival
description: Origins inspired by mythology, fantasy, and the medieval era.
body:
# Medieval Origins Revival
This is a port/rework of [Medieval Origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/medieval-origins) by ItsParkieLad, created to implement mod support and increase compatibility, improve gameplay clarity and accessibility, and make other QoL, balancing, and thematic changes.

**REQUIRES:**
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
- 1.20.1 versions also need [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- **Origins (Forge) is abandoned and NO LONGER supported**! 
- To play on Forge, you should [install a Forge version of the original Origins mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins/versions?g=1.20.1&l=forge)
# 
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&labelColor=222222&color=888888)](https://lunapixel.studio/discord)

*(Looking for Icarae? Check out [Icarae Origin](https://modrinth.com/mod/icarae-origin) by the Icarus Devs!)*

**Built-in integration for:**
- Mermod
- Icarus
- Spell Power Attributes
- Thermoo and mods that use it (Frostiful, Scorchful)
- Ice and Fire + Community Edition 


Most gear mods, notably:
- Mythic Metals 
- MC Dungeons Weapons
- Simply Swords
- RPG Series (Wizards, Spellblades, Paladins, etc.) - More to come in a separate mod
- *Pretty much everything* on 1.20+. If you manage to find something that doesn't work how you'd expect, please report it to the GitHub.
